entries.description: Rocket Studios today released "Kemonomics Re," a new simulation game for raising animals. This title is a remake based on the "Kemonomics" series, reworked to fit the modern playing environment. The player aims to return to Earth by collecting spaceship parts scattered around the planet while raising "beasts" that live on the planet where they crash-landed.

entries.title: Unity Studio, the official Unity editor for creating 3D apps in the browser, is officially released. Free trial is now available.
entries.title_ja: ブラウザで3Dアプリを作れるUnity公式エディター「Unity Studio」正式リリース。無料トライアルも提供中
entries.description:
Official Release of Unity Studio, an Official Unity Tool for Creating 3D Applications in the Browser
No-code animation application, UI creation, etc. are possible. In addition to paid licenses, free trials are also available.
Available for WebGPU compatible browsers (Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.). Mobile browsers are not supported at the time of the announcement.

entries.title: GIMP 3.2, an open source image editing tool, is officially released. New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
entries.title_ja: オープンソースの画像編集ツール「GIMP 3.2」正式リリース。新たな非破壊レイヤー「リンクレイヤー」「ベクターレイヤー」が実装
entries.description:
GIMP, an Open Source Image Editing Tool, Updated to Version 3.2
New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
Enhanced color selection function and UI/UX improvements were also added.

entries.title: Blender 5.1" is officially released. Bone Info" node for procedural rigging with enhanced linkage between armature and geometry nodes, etc. implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「Blender 5.1」正式リリース。アーマチュアとジオメトリノードの連携強化によりプロシージャルリギングを実現する「Bone Info」ノードなどが実装
entries.description:
March 17, 2026 (local time), the official release of Blender 5.1
Bone Info, an Input node that allows users to obtain transformation information from bones in armatures, has been added to the Geometry node.
Improved processing speed of shape keys and actions, and enhanced grease pencil fill functionality have also been implemented.

entries.title: UE5 rendering and optimization techniques, "Battlefield 6" development case study, and more. GPC 2025, a conference on graphics technology, with materials and archived videos of some of the presentations.
entries.title_ja: UE5のレンダリング・最適化手法や『Battlefield 6』開発事例など。グラフィックス技術のカンファレンス「GPC 2025」、一部講演の資料・アーカイブ動画が公開
entries.description:
Graphics Programming Conference 2025, a Conference Focusing on Graphics Technology, Presentation Materials and Archived Videos Now Available
Presentation materials are available for 30 lectures, including lectures on rendering and optimization techniques using Unreal Engine 5 and Cycles, the standard Blender renderer.
Eight archived videos are now available. including a lecture on "Battlefield 6" development case study.

entries.title: Free texture & material creation tool InstaMAT 2026 released, adds UV-independent and re-editable brushes

entries.description:
InstaMAT 2026, the latest version of InstaMAT 3D content authoring software, is now available
New features include "Curves Brushes" for drawing paths along mesh surfaces, image stabilization, and new mesh filters.
InstaMAT" is free for projects with annual revenues of less than $100,000.

entries.title: KPOP Girls!" is the first game in the KPOP series. Demon Hunters" uses UE's real-time rendering for high-quality 3D scenes; Epic Games releases production interview article

entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," an article published by Epic Games.
UE's real-time rendering enables highly accurate pre-visualization. As a specific example, a case study of a battle scene in a public bathhouse created with Volumetric is presented.
The article also discusses efforts to automate the workflow of importing animation rigs created in Maya into UE.

entries.title: Visuals for "Konosuba" 10th anniversary event revealed, featuring Sayuri Hara, Humberto, and others.

entries.description: The 10th anniversary event of the TV anime "Bless This Wonderful World! will be held on July 26 under the title of "Colorful" with two performances in the day and night. In addition, the event visual and ticket information have been released.

entries.title: The last episode of "Jigoku Sensei Nube" will be a one-hour SP with two consecutive episodes, with Hiroki Yasumoto playing the role of Haoni.
entries.title_ja: 「地獄先生ぬ～べ～」ラストは2話連続放送で1時間SP、覇鬼役は安元洋貴
entries.description: The last episode of the second season of the TV anime series "Jigoku Sensei Nube-" written by Sho Makura and Tsuyoshi Okano will be a one-hour special, with episodes 25 and 26 airing on March 25 at 11:15 p.m. in two consecutive episodes.

entries.title: Karin Anzai's school fantasy BL volume 1, which attracts people with different abilities, is released at the same time as the complete volume of "Face Lover
entries.title_ja: 安斎かりん、異能力者が集まる学園ファンタジーBL1巻　「顔好き」完結巻と同時発売
entries.description: Karin Anzai's new work "My Lips Are Aimed at - The Blue Line of Pororo Gakuen" volume 1 was released today, March 19. It is a school fantasy BL by Anzai, who is known for "I don't like you just because of your face.

entries.title: MAPPA, soon to celebrate its 15th anniversary, to exhibit for the first time in a booth at this year's AnimeJapan
entries.title_ja: まもなく15周年のMAPPA、今年の「AnimeJapan」でブース初出展
entries.description: Animation studio MAPPA will have a booth at AnimeJapan 2026 to be held at Tokyo Big Sight on March 28 and 29.

entries.title: The third season of "Chamfro" will begin airing in January 2027. Visual depicts Sanrak and other mysterious characters.
entries.title_ja: 「シャンフロ」第3期は2027年1月放送開始　サンラクたちと謎のキャラ描いたビジュアル
entries.description: The TV anime "'Shangri-La Frontier' 3rd season", written by Rina Hard and Ryosuke Fujii, will start airing in January 2027. A teaser visual has been released.

entries.title: Love Live! Hagukurino Girls' School Idol Club 4th Live Dream - Bloom, The Dream Believers - Blu-ray Memorial Box
entries.title_ja: ラブライブ！羽掻野女子学園スクールアイドルクラブ 4th Live Dream - Bloom, The Dream Believers - Blu-ray Memorial Box
entries.description: Blu-ray to be released on March 4, 2026. love live! series live event Memorial Box, featuring the 4th live performance of the Hagukino Girls' Academy School Idol Club, available for pre-order for 25,000 yen. [1]

entries.title: Red Desert" PC version to be released on March 19.
entries.title_ja: 『紅の砂漠』PC版が3月19日にリリース予定
entries.description: Pearl Abyss' single-player open-world RPG "Red Desert" will be released on March 19. After several years of development and multiple delays, the title features cinematic storytelling and combat diversity.

entries.title: KAZUMA KANEKO'S Tsukuyomi" reveals five playable characters and battle styles.
entries.title_ja: 『KAZUMA KANEKO'S ツクヨミ』5人のプレイアブルキャラとバトルスタイルが公開
entries.description: Coroplast has released new information about "KAZUMA KANEKO'S Tsukuyomi" for Switch, scheduled for release on April 23, revealing five playable characters, their respective battle styles, and a story mode that will be told from the perspective of the agent and the ringleader.

entries.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 1 Scheduled to End on March 19
entries.title_ja: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 1が3月19日に終了予定
entries.description: The latest season of Fortnite, which has been extended for two weeks, is scheduled to end on March 19. Community expectations are high for the transition to the next chapter.
